case_title: VLANTIS, JULIETTE L. vs. VANASKI, GERALD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANASKI, GERALD INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ERRAND BOYS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2090 CHESTNUT ST, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
